title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 477.120 - Expenditures, how paid
text:
477.120.  Expenditures, how paid. — All such expenditures accruing in the supreme court shall be paid out of the state treasury, and warrants shall be drawn accordingly, for which the certificate of the court shall be sufficient voucher.
(RSMo 1939 § 2051, A. 1949 S.B. 1139) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1887; 1919 § 2383; 1909 § 3905
